name: Fudgiest Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Coat a 13 x 9-inch baking pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the applesauce and sugar until well combined.
4. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
5. Mix in the vanilla extract.
6. Add the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt; beat well.
7. Stir in the chocolate chips.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 28 minutes at 350°F (175°C). Do not overbake or they will not be fudgy.
10. Allow to cool completely before cutting.
11. Store in the refrigerator.
